ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 5 AM – 2 AM (UTC)
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a reminder that the corporate VPN infrastructure will undergo routine maintenance from 5 AM to 2 AM UTC on Friday, 12 May 2026. During this window the VPN service will be temporarily unavailable. Please plan accordingly and avoid any critical outbound connections that rely on the VPN during that time.

If you have any questions or encounter issues after the maintenance, contact the IT Help Desk at helpdesk@example.com or call 555‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended – Immediate Action Required
